samples.name: americomputadora-chant
samples.desc: Sing the americomputadora chant, one syllable per beat, in a comfortable low voice: ah, mer, ick, ahmp, uter, do, rah. Each take captures one syllable — just sing the vowel cleanly and hold it for the beat. The pitch only needs to be a comfortable reference; it gets tuned to the melody afterward.
samples.lyric: ah mer ick ahmp u-ter do rah
